items.name: calendar-heatmap
items.title: CalendarHeatmap
items.description: GitHub-style yearly contribution heatmap with multi-year, weekStart, and i18n support.

items.name: weekday-heatmap
items.title: WeekdayHeatmap
items.description: Weekday × hour-of-day matrix with Sum row/column and independent colour scales.

items.name: date-heatmap
items.title: DateHeatmap
items.description: Date × hour matrix for zooming into a narrow time window with daily Sum column.

items.name: status-heatmap
items.title: StatusHeatmap
items.description: Timeline status indicator showing daily activity over a period (e.g. 90 days). Similar to Atlassian Statuspage.
